_comment: SYNTHETIC fixture modeled on real swflinc.com/blog/ rows (titles/urls/dates are real; investment_usd & jobs on two rows are illustrative — most live listing rows disclose neither). Shape mirrors public.swfl_inc_announcements. Exercises the classified-category filter: includes a 'partnership' row and a null-category row (both must be EXCLUDED from the momentum count) plus qualifying rows. Mixed counties. Regenerated 2026-05-30 when the parser moved from the dead /news/ page to the /blog/ category feeds.

rows.title: Express Employment Professionals Celebrates Grand Opening of New Office
rows.summary: Express Employment Professionals celebrated the grand opening of a new Naples office, representing $18 million in investment and 120 new full-time jobs.

rows.title: Regional Manufacturer Expands Lee County Operations
rows.summary: A regional manufacturer announced an expansion of its Lee County operations and additional production space.

rows.title: SWFL Inc. Announces 2026 Targeted Industry Training Grant
rows.summary: Southwest Florida Inc. was awarded a $4.2 million targeted industry training grant to expand regional workforce development programs.

rows.title: How Public Investment Fuels Private Success
rows.summary: SWFL Inc.'s President's Club event featured the Lee County MPO on how infrastructure investments shape mobility, growth, and business success.

rows.title: The Three Agreements of Housing in Southwest Florida
rows.summary: Three simple ideas the region can agree on when it comes to making housing happen in Southwest Florida — a coalition-building piece, not a project announcement.

rows.title: Top Business Networking Events in Southwest Florida
rows.summary: A roundup of the top business networking events in Southwest Florida — general chamber content, not an economic-development announcement.

rows.title: SWFL Inc. Honors Region's Top Leaders at 2026 INCredible Awards
rows.summary: SWFL Inc. convened the region's business and community leaders for the 2026 INCredible Awards — a chamber event, not a project announcement.

rows.title: Coastal Logistics Firm Relocates Distribution Hub to Fort Myers
rows.summary: A coastal logistics firm announced the relocation of its distribution hub to Fort Myers (prior-window announcement used for momentum comparison).

rows.title: Building a More Livable Southwest Florida After Hurricane Ian
rows.summary: On the region's workforce-housing shortage after Hurricane Ian — an advocacy piece (non-qualifying, and outside the 90/180-day windows).
